Event: Magic Well - July 2025
Event Date: 04/07/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: P26


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Ranger Chest
Armored Skirmisher Pistols

The unit's attacks have a 36% chance of ignoring 30% of the target's armor.
When attacking, the unit has a 50% chance to shoot thorns at 2 nearby enemy units. The thorns deal 128000 pure damage and stick to the targets for 3 sec.
If the enemy already has a thorn when another one hits them, the new thorn deals 208000 pure damage, and all thorns are removed from the enemy. Each thorn also applies exhaustion. Exhausted enemy unit takes physical damage equal to 100% of the pistols owner's attack every second. While the effect is active, their damage and attack speed are reduced by 25%. The exhaustion lasts 3 sec. Stacks up to 3 times.

Requirements: 98-100
